meta.title: construction-egy
meta.description: Web marketplace for construction with Supabase

messagesInbox.title: Messages
messagesInbox.subtitle: Conversation history
messagesInbox.empty: No conversations yet. Open any listing and tap “Message the seller”.

feed.pullToRefreshAria: Pull down to refresh the feed
feed.empty: No posts yet. Check back soon.
feed.postNotFound: This post is unavailable or was removed.

social.loginToComment: Sign in to add a comment.

feedPost.intro: Share an update, tip, or site story with the community. This is not a marketplace listing—use Market to sell or rent equipment.
feedPost.bodyLabel: What do you want to share?
feedPost.photoLimitHint: Up to {max} photos · JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF · max 4 MB each
feedPost.uploadFailed: Could not upload photos. Check your connection and try again.
feedPost.imageTypeInvalid: Use JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF.
feedPost.imageTooLarge: Each photo must be 4 MB or smaller.

owner.intro: Update your post text, photos, or location. Your post stays on the feed after saving.
owner.deleteConfirm: Delete this post permanently? Comments and likes will be removed. This cannot be undone.
owner.deleteFailed: Could not delete the post. Try again.
owner.deleteUnauthorized: Sign in again to delete your post.
owner.forbidden: You can only change your own posts.
owner.notFound: This post could not be found.

errors.unauthorized: Sign in to publish a post.
errors.saveFailed: Could not save your post. Try again.
errors.bodyRequired: Write something in the post body.
errors.invalidImages: Some images could not be accepted. Remove them and try again.

home.title: construction-egy
home.intro: A web app and marketplace for scaffolding: photos, bookings, and secure access with Supabase. Use the tabs below or the links to sign in.
home.cmsEmpty: Homepage content is not configured yet. Ask an admin to add homepage sections (Admin → Homepage) or desktop category cards with icons. You can still use the gallery and your account below.
home.desktopHomeHint: Large-screen category cards are configured in Admin → Homepage → desktop category uploads. Mobile layout is in the sections below on phones.

auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your email and password to continue
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: We’ll email you a link to choose a new password
auth.forgotPasswordSuccess: If an account exists for that email, we sent a reset link. Check your inbox and spam folder.
auth.forgotPasswordRecoveryFailed: That reset link did not work (it may have expired, already been used, or was opened in a different browser than the one where you requested the reset). Request a new link below, or use the token-based link from your email if your project uses a custom template.
auth.authCallbackMissingCode: This link is missing the security code. Request a new password reset email.
auth.authCallbackAccessDenied: Access was denied. Request a new password reset email.
auth.updatePasswordSubtitle: Enter and confirm your new password below
auth.updatePasswordInvalidSession: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new link from the log-in page.
auth.updatePasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

signup.title: Create account
signup.subtitle: Register with email and password to get started
signup.otpHint: Enter the {count}-digit code sent to your inbox. If it doesn’t arrive within two minutes, check spam or tap “Resend code”.
signup.verifyFailed: Sign-in did not complete. Try again.
signup.checkEmail: Check your email or your Supabase project settings.

accountSuspended.title: Your account is suspended
accountSuspended.body: Your session has been ended. If you think this is a mistake, contact support.

gallery.loadError: Could not load listings. Ensure the public listings migration is applied on Supabase (file 20260323140000_listings_public_read_anon.sql), then try again.

favorites.migrationHint: If you see a table error, run the `listing_favorites` database migration from the supabase/migrations folder.
favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.subtitle: Listings you saved to review later.
favorites.emptyHint: Tap the red heart in the gallery or on a listing page.

profile.title: My account
profile.subtitleGuest: Profile and settings — sign in for more.
profile.noProfileRecord: No profile record was found. Fill in the fields below and save to create one.

subscriptionRequired.title: Subscription required
subscriptionRequired.bodyGeneric: This area is limited while subscription enforcement is on. An admin must assign you an active subscription for the right feature (or “all features”). Listing categories can be set to free or paid in Admin → Categories; free categories stay open without premium.
subscriptionRequired.bodyWithFeature: “{feature}” is not included in your current access while enforcement is on. Contact an administrator to activate a subscription.
subscriptionRequired.bodyVerificationRfq: Request for quotation (RFQ) is available only to verified businesses. Upload your commercial register, tax card, and personal ID in My account. An administrator will review your documents.
subscriptionRequired.hintVerificationThenSubscription: After verification, you may still need an active subscription for RFQ when subscription enforcement is on.

publicProfile.title: User profile
publicProfile.contactHint: Use messages or listing contact details when available.
publicProfile.emptyListings: No published listings from this user yet.

businessVerification.heading: Business verification
businessVerification.intro: Enter your legal company name and save it first, then upload the three required documents. When all are uploaded, your application is sent for admin review. RFQ is available only after approval.
businessVerification.statusRejected: Your application was not approved. You can upload new documents below.
businessVerification.statusNone: Upload all three documents to submit for review.
businessVerification.formatsHint: PDF, JPG, PNG, or WebP — max 15 MB per file.
businessVerification.legalCompanyNameHint: Official registered name (e.g. commercial register). Required before document uploads.
businessVerification.uploadsLockedUntilLegalName: Save a valid legal company name above (at least 2 characters) to unlock document uploads.

actions.legalCompanyTooShort: Enter the legal company name (at least 2 characters).
actions.legalCompanyTooLong: Legal company name is too long (max 300 characters).

errors.NOT_EDITABLE: Verified accounts cannot replace documents here. Contact support if you need changes.
errors.UNSUPPORTED_TYPE: Use PDF or an image (JPG, PNG, WebP).
errors.STORAGE_FAILED: Could not store the file. Try again.
errors.DB_FAILED: Could not save document metadata. Try again.
errors.LEGAL_NAME_REQUIRED: Save your legal company name above before uploading documents.

list.title: Business verification — pending
list.lead: Users who submitted all three documents and are awaiting approval.

detail.title: Verification review
detail.legalCompanyMissing: No legal company name on file.

manual.lead: Search by name, phone, or full user ID and grant verified industry expert status without a pending application — same outcome as approving an application. Banned users cannot be granted. Use this for trusted experts and Veterans Corner eligibility.
manual.searchAria: Search users by name or phone
manual.searchHint: Type at least 2 characters (or paste a full user ID).

list.title: Expert verification — pending
list.lead: Users who applied to be recognized as industry experts and are awaiting review.

actions.grantedManually: User granted verified expert status manually.
actions.userBanned: Banned users cannot be granted expert status.
actions.alreadyVerified: This user is already a verified expert.

expertVerification.heading: Industry expert verification
expertVerification.intro: Apply to be recognized as a verified industry expert. Our team reviews your background. Business verification is not required — individuals and companies can both apply. Approved experts may be featured in Veterans Corner and show an expert badge on the feed.
expertVerification.statusVerified: You are a verified industry expert.
expertVerification.statusRejected: Your last application was not approved. You can update your details and apply again.
expertVerification.statusNone: You have not applied yet. Submit a short summary of your credentials and experience below. This is separate from company (business) verification.
expertVerification.summaryHint: Describe your background, certifications, or experience (minimum 20 characters, maximum 2000).
expertVerification.summaryPlaceholder: Years in the industry, key projects, certifications, specialties…

apply.success: Application submitted. We will review it soon.

errors.invalid: Check your summary and try again.
errors.summaryTooShort: Please write at least 20 characters about your credentials.
errors.loadFailed: Could not load your profile. Try again.
errors.notApplicable: You cannot submit a new application in your current status.

enforcement.label: Require subscriptions for RFQ, live map presence, and adding listings
enforcement.hint: When off, logged-in users keep previous access. When on, each user needs a matching row in Subscriptions (or “all features”). The same flag drives Postgres RLS—keep it in sync from here only.
enforcement.savedOn: Enforcement is now ON. Paid services and paid categories apply; users without a subscription are blocked.
enforcement.savedOff: Enforcement is now OFF. Everyone keeps access regardless of free/paid service settings (until you turn enforcement back on).

rfqPage.title: Request for quotation
rfqPage.subtitle: Upload spreadsheets (items) and supporting files. Sign in required.
rfqPage.opportunitiesLink: Browse open RFQs from other buyers (quote as supplier)

rfqUpload.hint: Spreadsheets (.xls, .xlsx) are parsed into line items. Other types are stored as attachments in your draft.
rfqUpload.emptyItems: No line items yet. Upload an Excel file with a description column.
rfqUpload.legalCompanyNameHint: Official registered name as on your commercial register. Required before upload and to publish.
rfqUpload.uploadLockedHint: This RFQ is open for bids — uploads are locked. You can still update the title.

errors.TOO_MANY_FILES: Too many files in one request.
errors.FILE_TOO_LARGE: One of the files is too large.
errors.TOTAL_TOO_LARGE: Total upload size is too large.
errors.SPREADSHEET_NO_ROWS: No data rows in the spreadsheet.
errors.SPREADSHEET_MISSING_DESCRIPTION_COLUMN: Missing a description column. Use the template headers (Arabic or English).
errors.SPREADSHEET_TOO_MANY_ROWS: Too many rows in the spreadsheet.
errors.UNSUPPORTED_EXTENSION: This file type is not allowed.
errors.REPLACE_TARGET_NOT_FOUND: Attachment to replace was not found.
errors.REPLACE_ATTACHMENT_UNUSED: Replace was requested but no matching file was processed.
errors.SPREADSHEET_UNMAPPED_COLUMNS: Some columns were not mapped and were ignored.
errors.SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED: A subscription is required for RFQ. Contact an administrator or open the subscription info page.
errors.DRAFT_LOCKED: This RFQ is no longer editable for uploads. Open a new draft or pick another one from the list.
errors.ITEMS_PERSIST_FAILED: Files uploaded but line items could not be saved to the database.
errors.LEGAL_COMPANY_NAME_REQUIRED: Set your legal company name in Account > Business verification before uploading.
errors.LEGAL_COMPANY_NAME_TOO_LONG: Legal company name is too long (max 300 characters).
errors.METADATA_SAVE_FAILED: Could not save company name. Try again.

rfqDraft.publishHint: When you are ready, publish this RFQ so subscribed suppliers can view it and submit a draft bid.
rfqDraft.lockedUploadHint: Uploads are locked while the RFQ is open for bids.

myDrafts.heading: My RFQs
myDrafts.empty: No drafts yet. Upload files below to create one.

actions.subscriptionRequired: A subscription is required for RFQ.
actions.published: RFQ is now open for supplier bids.
actions.legalCompanyInvalid: Enter the legal company name (at least 2 characters).
actions.legalCompanyTooLong: Legal company name is too long (max 300 characters).
actions.legalCompanyRequiredBeforePublish: Set your legal company name in Account > Business verification before opening for bids.

rfqOpportunity.listSubtitle: RFQs published by other buyers. You can view line items and attachments and submit a draft bid.

detail.noItems: No line items were saved for this RFQ.

bidForm.heading: Submit a draft bid
bidForm.hint: You can add an optional total and notes. Line-level pricing can be added later.
bidForm.filesHint: PDF, Word, images, ZIP, CAD, etc. Up to 10 files (max 25 MB each).

bidAttachments.heading: Your attachments
bidAttachments.addHint: While your bid is a draft you can attach offers, catalogs, or other documents.

bidActions.bidExists: You already have a bid on this RFQ.
bidActions.bidFailed: Could not save your bid (check the RFQ is open for bids).
bidActions.bidFilesPartialFail: Your bid was saved, but some files could not be uploaded. Add them below.
bidActions.bidNotEditable: This bid can no longer be edited.
bidActions.uploadFailed: Upload failed. Check file types and sizes.

adminHomepage.title: Homepage (mobile guest)
adminHomepage.lead: Manage carousel and grid sections for the logged-out home tab. Arabic and English fields are stored per row; the app picks text by the visitor’s language.
adminHomepage.mobileNote: The Home tab shows this layout for everyone (guests and signed-in). Users can still open “My ads” at /users/myads from their profile and listings. Theme (light / dark / system) is unchanged.
adminHomepage.desktopCategoriesLinkLead: Wide-screen home can show cards with uploaded icons: each links to a marketplace category (filtered gallery) or a subscription feature (RFQ, map, new listing, etc.).
adminHomepage.emptySections: No sections yet. Create one below.
adminHomepage.itemsLead: Slides (carousel) or cards (grid). Pick a marketplace category to link straight to the gallery filter, or leave it empty and set a custom path. Grid cards can use a named icon or an emoji.
adminHomepage.emptyItems: No items in this section yet.

forms.confirmDeleteSection: Delete this section and all its items?
forms.hrefHint: Used when no category is selected. If a category is selected, the saved link becomes /gallery?category=… automatically.
forms.iconEmojiHint: Shown when no preset icon is chosen. Preset icon takes precedence.
forms.itemHint: At least one title (Arabic or English) is required. Badge number takes precedence over badge text when both are set.

actions.invalidSlug: Invalid slug (use lowercase latin, numbers, underscore).
actions.titleRequired: Enter at least one title (Arabic or English).
actions.invalidBadge: Badge must be a non-negative integer.

desktopCategories.title: Desktop home — category & service cards
desktopCategories.lead: Each card uses an uploaded icon and links either to a marketplace category (gallery filter) or to a subscription feature area (RFQ, map, etc.). JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF, max 2 MB. English titles come from the category or service labels.
desktopCategories.replaceImageHint: Leave empty to keep the current image; only sort order and enabled change.
desktopCategories.confirmDelete: Delete this card and remove its file from storage?
desktopCategories.slugTaken: That category already has a desktop card.
desktopCategories.targetAlreadyHasCard: That category or feature already has a desktop card.
desktopCategories.noTargetsAvailable: No categories or subscription features are available to add (all are already used, or lists are empty).
desktopCategories.serviceNotAllowed: This feature cannot be used for a home card.
desktopCategories.imageBadType: Use JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF.

adminVeteransCorner.lead: Promote a published feed post to the Veterans Corner slot on the home feed (order: regular post, then Veterans, then RFQ). Only the latest promoted post is shown. Demote to remove it. The expert badge still appears only when the author is verified.
adminVeteransCorner.unauthorized: You are not allowed to change this setting.
adminVeteransCorner.notPublished: Only published posts can be featured.

adminSubscriptionsPage.title: Subscriptions
adminSubscriptionsPage.body: Assign or edit a user’s subscription from the users table (open a user, then Subscriptions). Define which services are free or paid under Subscription services.
adminSubscriptionsPage.enforcementReminder: Important: “Paid” on Subscription services only restricts users when Enforcement above is switched ON. If enforcement is off, all logged-in users can still use RFQ, the map, and listings.
adminSubscriptionsPage.usersLink: Users — open a profile to manage subscriptions
adminSubscriptionsPage.servicesLink: Subscription services — free / paid per feature key

adminSubscriptionServices.intro: Each row is a feature key used in user subscriptions (same list as the “Feature” dropdown when adding a subscription). When subscription enforcement is on, “Paid” services require an active subscription row for that key or “all”. “Free” stays open to everyone. New keys you add appear in the admin subscription form once saved; wiring new gates in the app still needs a developer for pages and RLS if required.
adminSubscriptionServices.createHint: Use a stable Latin key (snake_case). Example: contractor_leads. Then assign subscriptions to users from the subscriptions screen.
adminSubscriptionServices.fieldPaid: Requires subscription when enforcement is on
adminSubscriptionServices.fieldPaidHint: Turn off to make this service free for everyone while enforcement is on.
adminSubscriptionServices.emptyHint: No rows — run the subscription_services migration on Supabase.
adminSubscriptionServices.enforcementOffBody: Free/paid flags here do not block users until you enable enforcement. Turn it on under Subscriptions.

list.title: RFQ moderation
list.lead: Review buyer drafts, line items, attachments, and supplier bids. Change RFQ status or bid outcome when needed.

moderationForm.heading: Moderate RFQ
moderationForm.hint: Changing status affects who can upload files and who sees this RFQ in the opportunities list.
moderationForm.notePlaceholder: Visible to admins only (stored in draft metadata).

adminCategories.requiresSubscriptionHint: When subscription enforcement is on, only users with premium listings (or “all”) can post in this category. New categories stay free until you enable this.
adminCategories.labelEnHint: Optional. Used when the visitor’s language is English (e.g. desktop category card title). If empty, a formatted slug is shown.
adminCategories.labelEnTooLong: English name must be at most 200 characters.

listingForm.paidCategoriesHint: Categories marked “paid” need an active premium listing subscription while enforcement is on.

listingActions.paidCategoryBlocked: This category requires a premium listing subscription while enforcement is on. Choose another category or contact an admin.

adminUserEdit.emailNeedsServiceRole: Email appears here when SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY is set on the server (for example in Vercel project environment variables).
adminUserEdit.emailFetchFailed: Could not load email from authentication.

mapPage.title: Map
mapPage.subtitle: Only people who turn on “Available now” appear. We use precise GPS only while that mode is on.
mapPage.filterCategoryAria: Filter the map by service category
mapPage.liveCategoryAria: Service you offer while on the map
mapPage.noPinsInCategory: No one is live in this category right now.
mapPage.errorCategoryRequired: Choose the service category you offer, then tap “Available now”.
mapPage.myLocationAria: My location — center the map on your current position
mapPage.errorGeolocation: Could not get your location. Check settings and try again.
mapPage.errorGeolocationPermission: Location permission was denied. Allow location access in the browser or app settings.
mapPage.errorLocationServicesOff: Location services (GPS) are turned off on this device.
mapPage.errorLocationServicesOffHint: “Available now” does not turn on GPS by itself. Open system Settings → Location and turn location on, then allow the app to use location if prompted. Tap “Available now” again.
mapPage.errorSave: Could not save your map presence.
mapPage.errorSaveMigration: The map table may be missing or not exposed. Apply the Supabase migrations for live_map_pins, then try again.
mapPage.noPins: No one is on the map with “Available now” right now.
mapPage.pollHint: Others’ pins refresh about every minute. Your session extends when your position updates.
mapPage.subscriptionRequiredBanner: Going live on the map requires an active subscription while enforcement is on.
mapPage.subscriptionRequiredLinkAria: Open subscription required information for the live map

errors.sendFailed: Could not send the message. Try again.
